summary: Frontend-only regression for Vite cleanup passed for core rendering and navbar navigation on public URL. Vite entry/build structure is active (index.html -> /src/main.jsx, Vercel dist target present), but one CRA-era env variable remains.
action_items: Remove WDS_SOCKET_PORT from /app/frontend/.env to fully complete CRA/CRACO remnant cleanup.
Re-run a quick frontend smoke test after .env cleanup to confirm no runtime regression.
critical_code_review_comments: Vite-only structure is correctly wired: no craco config found, no src/index.js entry, and no frontend/public/index.html.
Build/deploy alignment looks correct for Vercel static build with dist output.
CRA remnant detected: /app/frontend/.env still contains WDS_SOCKET_PORT=443.
/api/clinics remains MOCKED in this environment (unchanged from prior iterations).
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI smoke passed on public URL: landing renders, navbar visible, /login navigation works, and no page-level error selectors detected. One cleanup gap remains in frontend/.env (WDS_SOCKET_PORT).
rca of the issue: Root cause: incomplete CRA cleanup left an old webpack dev-server env key (WDS_SOCKET_PORT) in frontend/.env. Repro: run `rg -n --hidden "WDS_SOCKET_PORT" /app/frontend` and observe match in .env. Mitigation: remove the key and retest landing/login route load.
